title: New view : Automation view
excerpt:
Is there a way to add a new view for automations? 
I would love to be able to add a wizard in automations/integrations set-up for some upcoming applications we are building.

posts.author: DevdeVince (Vincent Coval - Devdevils)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to add a new view for automations?
I would love to be able to add a wizard in automations/integrations set-up for some upcoming applications we are building.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @DevdeVince!

I am not sure I understand. Do you mean you want to create something like a “pop-up” that opens up when someone is adding an integration feature to a board?

posts.author: DevdeVince (Vincent Coval - Devdevils)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday,
my request is when setting up an automation, to be able to configure part of that automation set-up using a wizard.
One example, if you want to use the LinkedIn automation, you need to 1/ link your linkedin account 2/ map what columns correspond to the post fields like following :

image1759×870 29.8 KB

What I would like is that, in this modal, the ability to add my own wizard.

I hope it’s more clear.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @DevdeVince,

Thank you for that explanation!

That is a native app built by monday.com. The wizard you see in that application is not available for “private” apps.

As a workaround, you can use an Authorization URL as explained here and an input field (with the recipe sentence as a source) for the user to configure specific fields (as explained here).

Let me know if you have any questions!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: DevdeVince (Vincent Coval - Devdevils)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday ,
I understand that it’s a native app, that’s why I’m requesting that as app developper we can have the ability to build similar wizard.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @DevdeVince,

That is definitely an interesting request!

Please create a new request topic here so that other devs can vote for it!!

Cheers,
Matias
